title: ParsingError
description: JSON schema for structured parsing error objects

file_path.description: Path to the file that caused the error

line_number.description: Line number where error occurred (if applicable)

field.description: Field name that caused the error (for INVALID_FIELD type)

needs_remediation.description: Whether the file needs manual remediation

recovery_suggestion.description: Suggested action to fix the error

extracted_id.description: ID extracted via fallback method (for MISSING_FRONTMATTER)
